markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Intro call to explore GrowthX's AI content services for Ipsy's blog.](https://fathom.video/share/6P11sPegq4scDPbGxEmyKGcZnKR1FPax?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Ipsy needs to scale editorial content** for SEO and AI search (AEO/GEO) but is blocked by internal resource constraints and a lack of trust in generic AI tools like Copy.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/6P11sPegq4scDPbGxEmyKGcZnKR1FPax?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
  - [**GrowthX's solution is a two-phase partnership:** an 8-week Strategy Sprint ($40k) to build a custom AI engine, followed by a 12-month Growth Execution phase ($15k/mo for 5 articles/week) for daily publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/6P11sPegq4scDPbGxEmyKGcZnKR1FPax?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [**The core differentiator is "artifacts"**—custom, brand-specific inputs (e.g., product catalogs, audience profiles) that ensure AI-generated content is accurate and on-brand, solving Ipsy's trust issue.](https://fathom.video/share/6P11sPegq4scDPbGxEmyKGcZnKR1FPax?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [**The partnership is full-service:** GrowthX handles strategy, content creation, technical SEO, and publishing, requiring only Ipsy's review and feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/6P11sPegq4scDPbGxEmyKGcZnKR1FPax?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)

## Topics

### Ipsy's Content & SEO Challenges

  - [**Goal:** Increase editorial content velocity to improve SEO and capture visibility in AI search (AEO/GEO).](https://fathom.video/share/6P11sPegq4scDPbGxEmyKGcZnKR1FPax?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
  - [**Blockers:**](https://fathom.video/share/6P11sPegq4scDPbGxEmyKGcZnKR1FPax?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
      - [**Resource Constraints:** No internal bandwidth for high-volume content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/6P11sPegq4scDPbGxEmyKGcZnKR1FPax?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
      - [**Workflow Friction:** A recent blog migration to Contentful means publishing is currently owned by the tech team, slowing the process.](https://fathom.video/share/6P11sPegq4scDPbGxEmyKGcZnKR1FPax?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [**Trust in AI:** Generic tools like Copy.ai require heavy human oversight to ensure brand voice and accuracy, negating their efficiency gains.](https://fathom.video/share/6P11sPegq4scDPbGxEmyKGcZnKR1FPax?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
  - [**Potential Scope Expansion:**](https://fathom.video/share/6P11sPegq4scDPbGxEmyKGcZnKR1FPax?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
      - [**PDPs:** 2,000+ product pages for Ipsy's e-commerce shop.](https://fathom.video/share/6P11sPegq4scDPbGxEmyKGcZnKR1FPax?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
      - [**Meta Content:** Titles and descriptions across the entire website.](https://fathom.video/share/6P11sPegq4scDPbGxEmyKGcZnKR1FPax?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)

### GrowthX's Solution: A Two-Phase Partnership

  - [**Phase 1: 8-Week Strategy Sprint ($40k)**](https://fathom.video/share/6P11sPegq4scDPbGxEmyKGcZnKR1FPax?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
      - [**Goal:** Build a custom AI engine and content OS tailored to Ipsy's brand.](https://fathom.video/share/6P11sPegq4scDPbGxEmyKGcZnKR1FPax?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
      - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/6P11sPegq4scDPbGxEmyKGcZnKR1FPax?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
          - [**Deep Dive:** Audit Ipsy's business, products, and target audience.](https://fathom.video/share/6P11sPegq4scDPbGxEmyKGcZnKR1FPax?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
          - [**Artifact Creation:** Develop custom inputs (e.g., audience profiles, product catalogs) to guide the AI.](https://fathom.video/share/6P11sPegq4scDPbGxEmyKGcZnKR1FPax?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
          - [**Content OS:** Build a Notion-based system for managing the content roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/6P11sPegq4scDPbGxEmyKGcZnKR1FPax?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
          - [**Technical SEO:** Conduct an audit and advise on schema markup.](https://fathom.video/share/6P11sPegq4scDPbGxEmyKGcZnKR1FPax?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
      - [**Deliverable:** \~10 live articles by the end of the sprint to calibrate quality.](https://fathom.video/share/6P11sPegq4scDPbGxEmyKGcZnKR1FPax?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
  - [**Phase 2: 12-Month Growth Execution (Starts at $15k/mo)**](https://fathom.video/share/6P11sPegq4scDPbGxEmyKGcZnKR1FPax?tab=summary&timestamp=897.0)
      - [**Goal:** Scale content production to daily publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/6P11sPegq4scDPbGxEmyKGcZnKR1FPax?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
      - [**Pricing:**](https://fathom.video/share/6P11sPegq4scDPbGxEmyKGcZnKR1FPax?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
          - [**$15k/mo:** 5 articles per week.](https://fathom.video/share/6P11sPegq4scDPbGxEmyKGcZnKR1FPax?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
          - [**$18k–$20k/mo:** For higher volume.](https://fathom.video/share/6P11sPegq4scDPbGxEmyKGcZnKR1FPax?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
      - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/6P11sPegq4scDPbGxEmyKGcZnKR1FPax?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
          - [**GrowthX:** Handles all research, writing, SEO optimization, and publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/6P11sPegq4scDPbGxEmyKGcZnKR1FPax?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
          - [**Ipsy:** Provides timely feedback on drafts.](https://fathom.video/share/6P11sPegq4scDPbGxEmyKGcZnKR1FPax?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
          - [**Analytics:** Tracks performance via Looker (traditional SEO) and Scrunch (AI visibility).](https://fathom.video/share/6P11sPegq4scDPbGxEmyKGcZnKR1FPax?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)

### GrowthX's AI Content Workflow

  - [**Core Principle:** A multi-step, agentic workflow that ensures quality and brand alignment, unlike simple one-shot AI prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/6P11sPegq4scDPbGxEmyKGcZnKR1FPax?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/6P11sPegq4scDPbGxEmyKGcZnKR1FPax?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
    1.  [**Brief Generation:** An AI agent creates a detailed brief based on SEO analysis (keywords, competitors, intent) and the custom artifacts.](https://fathom.video/share/6P11sPegq4scDPbGxEmyKGcZnKR1FPax?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
    2.  [**Iterative Research:** An agent performs research, targeting specific objectives and sources (e.g., medical journals for Biologica). If quality thresholds are not met, the research is refined and re-run.](https://fathom.video/share/6P11sPegq4scDPbGxEmyKGcZnKR1FPax?tab=summary&timestamp=1207.0)
    3.  [**Knowledge Graph:** Research is stored in a structured knowledge graph, making it easily retrievable for future content and ensuring consistency.](https://fathom.video/share/6P11sPegq4scDPbGxEmyKGcZnKR1FPax?tab=summary&timestamp=1250.0)
    4.  [**Drafting & Review:** The AI drafts content, which is then reviewed against the custom artifacts and brand guidelines before being sent to Ipsy for feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/6P11sPegq4scDPbGxEmyKGcZnKR1FPax?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:** Share the presentation deck and resources with Matt and Stacey.](https://fathom.video/share/6P11sPegq4scDPbGxEmyKGcZnKR1FPax?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
  - [**Matt & Stacey:** Review the materials and decide whether to schedule a follow-up call with Marcel (GrowthX CEO).](https://fathom.video/share/6P11sPegq4scDPbGxEmyKGcZnKR1FPax?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
